metadata.description: Maxim commercial pack marketplace. 14 packs across 3 tiers: L1 capabilities, L2 persona bundles, L3 verticals. Licensed per-purchase via Stripe (primary; LemonSqueezy secondary, dormant until v1.0.1 per ADR-011), validated via Cloudflare Worker RS256 JWT.

plugins.name: maxim
plugins.description: The behavioral intelligence layer for Claude Code. 90 specialist agents across 7 executive offices, 34 skill domains, 38 slash commands, 64 behavioral frameworks, 14 compliance frameworks, license-gated MCP middleware. Starter tier is $0 forever; paid packs install from this same marketplace after purchase. BSL 1.1 (Apache 2.0 on 2030-04-21).

plugins.name: mxm-pack-l1-1-ai-governance
plugins.description: Audit trail, confidence tagging, and ethical checks on every AI decision. Primary framework: Prospect Theory (Kahneman & Tversky, 1979). MOAT-01.

plugins.name: mxm-pack-l1-2-mempalace-pro
plugins.description: Cross-session memory that resumes your project where you left it. Primary framework: Cognitive Load Theory (Sweller, 1988). MOAT-02.

plugins.name: mxm-pack-l1-3-proactive-watch
plugins.description: Ten drift classes scanned continuously. Catches regressions before they ship. Primary framework: Signal Detection Theory (Green & Swets, 1966). MOAT-03.

plugins.name: mxm-pack-l1-4-compliance-shield
plugins.description: 14 regulated-industry frameworks enforced at the MCP layer. Audit-ready on demand. Primary framework: COM-B (Michie et al., 2011). MOAT-04.

plugins.name: mxm-pack-l1-5-brand-design-pro
plugins.description: Brand voice locked across AI outputs. 15 cinematic styles. Design that doesn't read as AI. Primary framework: Dual Process Theory (Kahneman, 2011). MOAT-05.

plugins.name: mxm-pack-l1-6-behavioral-intelligence
plugins.description: 64 peer-reviewed behavioral frameworks applied to every Maxim output. The flagship moat. Primary framework: Fogg Behavior Model B=MAP (Fogg, 2009). MOAT-06.

plugins.name: mxm-pack-l2-1-founder-os
plugins.description: Persona bundle for solo founders. Combines AI Governance, MemPalace Pro, and Proactive Watch. Ships as part of Pro tier at $39/mo per ADR-009.

plugins.name: mxm-pack-l2-2-growth-stack
plugins.description: Persona bundle for growth-stage teams. Marketing, brand, behavioral science at scale.

plugins.name: mxm-pack-l2-3-professional-os
plugins.description: Full L1 suite for solo consultants and boutique agencies. Five L1 packs.

plugins.name: mxm-pack-l2-4-agency-all-in
plugins.description: Full L1 suite plus all six L1 packs. Agency tier with unlimited operator seats.

plugins.name: mxm-pack-l3-1-healthcare
plugins.description: Healthcare vertical overlay. HIPAA, ISO 13485, ISO 14971, FHIR/HL7 enforcement. One-time purchase.

plugins.name: mxm-pack-l3-2-legal
plugins.description: Legal vertical overlay. Privileged communication protection, privacy frameworks, conflict-of-interest patterns. One-time purchase.

plugins.name: mxm-pack-l3-3-fintech
plugins.description: Fintech vertical overlay. PCI-DSS, SOC 2, FINTRAC, PIPEDA enforcement. One-time purchase.

plugins.name: mxm-pack-l3-4-govtech
plugins.description: GovTech vertical overlay. NIST CSF, FedRAMP, records retention. One-time purchase.
